items.summary: On the OTP login page, after a user successfully verifies their OTP, check if the logged-in mobile number is '9422018674'. If it matches, redirect to the admin panel route (/admin). For all other users, redirect to the user dashboard (/dashboard). Ensure this redirect logic is clearly implemented and reliable.

Ensure the admin panel page (/admin route) enforces access control: only the user authenticated with mobile number '9422018674' can view it. Any other authenticated user who navigates to /admin should be redirected to /dashboard.

In the backend, ensure the admin account with mobile number '9422018674' is pre-seeded or auto-created on first OTP request if not already registered, so admin can always log in via OTP without needing to go through the registration flow.
